**测试的依赖项**

> This documentation is for an unreleased version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/zh/docs/dev/configuration/testing/>).

#  用于测试的依赖项 #

Flink 提供了用于测试作业的实用程序，您可以将其添加为依赖项。

##  DataStream API 测试 #

如果要为使用 DataStream API 构建的作业开发测试用例，则需要添加以下依赖项：

Maven

Open the `pom.xml` file in your project directory and add the following in the dependencies block.


    &ltdependency&gt
        &ltgroupId&gtorg.apache.flink&lt/groupId&gt
        &ltartifactId&gtflink-test-utils&lt/artifactId&gt
        &ltversion&gt2.4-SNAPSHOT&lt/version&gt
        &ltscope&gttest&lt/scope&gt
    &lt/dependency&gt

Copied to clipboard!

Check out [Project configuration](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-master//zh/docs/dev/configuration/overview/>) for more details.

Gradle

Open the `build.gradle` file in your project directory and add the following in the dependencies block.


    testCompile "org.apache.flink:flink-test-utils:2.4-SNAPSHOT"

Copied to clipboard!

**Note:** This assumes that you have created your project using our Gradle build script or quickstart script.
Check out [Project configuration](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-master//zh/docs/dev/configuration/overview/>) for more details.

在各种测试实用程序中，该模块提供了 `MiniCluster` （一个可配置的轻量级 Flink 集群，能在 JUnit 测试中运行），可以直接执行作业。

有关如何使用这些实用程序的更多细节，请查看 [DataStream API 测试](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-master/zh/docs/dev/datastream/testing/>)。

##  Table API 测试 #

如果您想在您的 IDE 中本地测试 Table API 和 SQL 程序，除了前述提到的 `flink-test-utils` 之外，您还要添加以下依赖项：

Maven

Open the `pom.xml` file in your project directory and add the following in the dependencies block.


    &ltdependency&gt
        &ltgroupId&gtorg.apache.flink&lt/groupId&gt
        &ltartifactId&gtflink-table-test-utils&lt/artifactId&gt
        &ltversion&gt2.4-SNAPSHOT&lt/version&gt
        &ltscope&gttest&lt/scope&gt
    &lt/dependency&gt

Copied to clipboard!

Check out [Project configuration](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-master//zh/docs/dev/configuration/overview/>) for more details.

Gradle

Open the `build.gradle` file in your project directory and add the following in the dependencies block.


    testCompile "org.apache.flink:flink-table-test-utils:2.4-SNAPSHOT"

Copied to clipboard!

**Note:** This assumes that you have created your project using our Gradle build script or quickstart script.
Check out [Project configuration](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-master//zh/docs/dev/configuration/overview/>) for more details.

这将自动引入查询计划器和运行时，分别用于计划和执行查询。

> `flink-table-test-utils` 模块已在 Flink 1.15 中引入，目前被认为是实验性的。
